etymology.description: phonetic 戌 (xū, "ninth month") + semantic 火 (huǒ, "fire") -> 烕 (huǐ, phonetic)
etymology.interpretation: The character 烕 combines the phonetic component 戌 (xū, "ninth month") with the semantic component 火 (huǒ, "fire") to convey the phonetic aspect of the character. This reflects the use of fire or potential burning as part of its broader linguistic or symbolic field.
